heading: Annual allocation
label: 4235 Annual allocation
text: For each fiscal year, the Secretary shall allocate any amounts made available for assistance under this subchapter for the fiscal year, in accordance with the formula established pursuant to to the Department of Hawaiian Home Lands if the Department complies with the requirements under this subchapter for a grant under this subchapter.section 4236 of this title
